slides.title: Narrow Table Layout Stress Test
slides.strapline: Dense table rows and verbose labels validate pagination and insight panel consistency

rows: Operating expense as percent of revenue

insights: Revenue run-rate and cash conversion both improve through the horizon, supporting a constructive baseline view.
Margin normalization peaks in FY2025 before moderating, so mix and delivery-cost discipline remain key diligence focus areas.
Working-capital metrics improve consistently, reducing cash drag and improving operating resilience.
Use this table as a directional view and validate final figures during confirmatory diligence.
slides.notes: Note: All figures are synthetic lorem values and exist only for layout stress validation.
